name: Deduction for Coal Industry Retiree Health Premiums

eligibility.description: Applies to 'last signatory operators' in the coal industry required to provide health benefits to retirees under the Coal Industry Retiree Health Benefit Act of 1992.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Any premium required to be paid by a last signatory operator to the 1992 UMWA Benefit Plan is fully deductible as a business expense.
